texto: What do they expect of us if a time ever comes when the war is over? Through the years our business has been killing
autor: -it was our first calling in life. Our knowledge of life is limited to death. What will happen afterwards? And what shall come out of us?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de -it was our first calling in life. Our knowledge of life is limited to death. What will happen afterwards? And what shall come out of us? que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What do they expect of us if a time ever comes when the war is over? Through the years our busine…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre negocios, erich-maria-remarque, all-quiet-on-the-western-front, com foco em all-quiet-on-the-western-front.
